name: novachat
description: NovaChat is a modern Android AI chatbot application that supports online (cloud-based) AI models. Offline (on-device) mode is planned but currently unavailable because AICore is not yet published to Maven. Built with the latest Android technologies targeting Android 16.

scripts.verify:functions: cd functions && npm ci && npm run build && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.verify: npm run verify:android && npm run verify:functions && npm run format:check
